name: drawio-remote
description: Bridges Claude Desktop to the hosted draw.io MCP server at drawmcp.because-security.com.
long_description: A thin MCP bundle that uses mcp-remote to connect Claude Desktop to a remote draw.io MCP server over Streamable HTTP. The remote server exposes draw.io diagram tools via the MCP `/mcp` endpoint. No local server code runs; the bundle simply spawns `npx mcp-remote <url>` as a stdio-to-HTTP bridge.

server_url.title: Remote MCP URL
server_url.description: Full URL of the remote draw.io MCP endpoint (must include /mcp path). Override to point at your own deployment.
